goal: Implement renderer-neutral node drag parent expansion, prove multi-node and sibling behavior, add adapter-facing conformance coverage if needed, and close the lane without adding renderer dependencies to the headless crates.
checkpoints: after JNPE-020 single-parent runtime expansion tests pass
after JNPE-030 multi-parent and sibling behavior tests pass
after JNPE-040 conformance/template decision and gates pass
after JNPE-050 package closeout gates pass
side_effect_policy: User authorized autonomous commits in this session; commit only verified bounded work, do not push, and do not revert unrelated user changes.
stop_conditions: renderer, platform, wgpu, egui, Fret, screenshot, or pixel dependency becomes necessary inside jellyflow-core or jellyflow-runtime
parent expansion requires a new persisted schema migration instead of existing Graph fields
nested parent cascading broadens the contract beyond this lane
existing expand_parent=false parent clamping changes unintentionally
